button.name: action_send_interview_slot_survey
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or not meeting_ids or x_psm_0205_eval_round_1_toggle

button.name: action_send_interview_round2_notification
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or x_psm_0205_next_interview_round != '2' or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_1_toggle or not x_psm_0205_next_round_event_needs_notification

button.name: action_send_interview_round3_notification
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or x_psm_0205_next_interview_round != '3' or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_2_toggle or not x_psm_0205_next_round_event_needs_notification

button.name: action_send_interview_round4_notification
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or x_psm_0205_next_interview_round != '4' or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_3_toggle or not x_psm_0205_next_round_event_needs_notification

button.name: action_invite_interview_l3
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_max_interview_round < 3 or stage_id != %(stage_office_interview_2)d or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_2_toggle

button.name: action_invite_interview_l4
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_max_interview_round < 4 or stage_id != %(stage_office_interview_3)d or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_3_toggle

button.name: action_ready_for_offer
button.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or (x_psm_0205_max_interview_round == 2 and (stage_id != %(stage_office_interview_2)d or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_2_toggle)) or (x_psm_0205_max_interview_round == 3 and (stage_id != %(stage_office_interview_3)d or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_3_toggle)) or (x_psm_0205_max_interview_round >= 4 and (stage_id != %(stage_office_interview_4)d or not x_psm_0205_eval_round_4_toggle))

field.name: stage_id
field.invisible: ((not active and not employee_id) or is_pool_applicant) or x_psm_0205_recruitment_type == 'office'

field.name: stage_id
field.invisible: ((not active and not employee_id) or is_pool_applicant) or x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office'

div.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or not x_psm_0205_next_interview_round or stage_id not in [%(stage_office_screening)d, %(stage_office_interview_1)d, %(stage_office_interview_2)d, %(stage_office_interview_3)d] or (stage_id == %(stage_office_screening)d and x_psm_0205_interview_date_1) or (stage_id == %(stage_office_interview_1)d and x_psm_0205_interview_date_2) or (stage_id == %(stage_office_interview_2)d and x_psm_0205_interview_date_3) or (stage_id == %(stage_office_interview_3)d and x_psm_0205_interview_date_4)

xpath.div: Vui lòng cập nhật ngày phỏng vấn cho vòng hiện tại để kích hoạt các nút mời phỏng vấn và gửi khảo sát đánh giá ứng viên.

group.string: Lập lịch phỏng vấn tiếp theo
group.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or not x_psm_0205_next_interview_round or stage_id not in [%(stage_office_screening)d, %(stage_office_interview_1)d, %(stage_office_interview_2)d, %(stage_office_interview_3)d]

group.name: survey_group
group.string: Kết Quả Khảo Sát Năng Lực
Kết quả khảo sát năng lực
Kết quả khảo sát năng lực
Kết quả khảo sát năng lực
Kết quả khảo sát năng lực
Tổng hợp kết quả các vòng phỏng vấn
